transcription.text: This is the time of year when the flu starts to spread. Before the first sneeze, help protect with a spray. Before the first tissue, help defend with a wipe. And help prevent with Lysol to get 10 times more protection and kill 99.9% of germs around the house. This season, help protect your family with Lysol. Start healthy.

segments.text: This is the time of year when the flu starts to spread.
